title: dev workflow: ruff/uv/pyright/pre-commit/pytest
description: Add modern dev tooling: pyproject.toml with uv, ruff lint+format, pyright strict mode, pre-commit hooks, pytest with pytest-homeassistant-custom-component. Smoke tests for coordinator and sensor. New CI workflow runs lint+types+tests. Python 3.12, HA 2025.1+. No version bump - dev infra only.

title: v0.3.0: async + coordinator + unique_id + new API URL
description: Modernization PR 1. Migrate sensor.py from sync requests to aiohttp via HA session. Replace Throttle with DataUpdateCoordinator. Replace Entity base class with SensorEntity + CoordinatorEntity. Add unique_id and DeviceInfo. Update API URL from goodservice.io to api.subwaynow.app. Fix manifest version (drop v-prefix). Bump GitHub Actions checkout@v2 -> v4. Keep YAML config working.

title: v0.4.0: config flow + alert binary sensors + bundled icons + parity wins
description: Tier 1 features from competitive review. Config flow replaces YAML. Per-line alert binary sensors (has_delays, has_service_change, has_planned_work) sourced from MTA camsys/subway-alerts JSON feed. Bundle bullet SVGs as static assets via hass.http.register_static_path. Split direction_statuses dict into discrete N/S sensors. Submit to HACS Default after this lands.

title: v1.0.0: elevator/escalator + accessibility + LIRR/MNR
description: Tier 2 differentiators - features no other HA MTA integration has. E&E outage sensors per station from web.mta.info/developers/data/nyct/nyct_ene.xml. Station accessibility binary sensor combining static GTFS wheelchair flag with live E&E. Extend to LIRR and Metro-North line status (verify subwaynow coverage; fall back to MTA GTFS-RT alerts feeds if not). Tag 1.0.0 release.
